user_story: Bridge 100 USDC from Ethereum to Arbitrum via Across — exercises the new `across_bridge` composite path: live quote, ERC-20 approval for the resolved origin-chain SpokePool, and the `depositV3` SpokePool call, all routed through the host wallet.

turns.prompt: Bridge 100 USDC from Ethereum (chain 1) to Arbitrum (chain 42161) via Across. Origin USDC is 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48, destination USDC is 0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831. Use the same wallet as depositor and recipient. Stage the approval and depositV3 transactions for me to sign.
